name: EVALUATION FOR HEARING AID CANDIDACY, UNILATERAL OR BILATERAL, INCLUDING REVIEW AND INTEGRATION OF AUDIOLOGIC FUNCTION TESTS, ASSESSMENT, AND INTERPRETATION OF HEARING NEEDS (EG, SPEECH-IN-NOISE, SUPRATHRESHOLD HEARING MEASURES), DISCUSSION OF CANDIDACY RESULTS, COUNSELING ON TREATMENT OPTIONS WITH REPORT, AND, WHEN PERFORMED, ASSESSMENT OF COGNITIVE AND COMMUNICATION STATUS; FIRST 30 MINUTES

descriptions: EVALUATION FOR HEARING AID CANDIDACY, UNILATERAL OR BILATERAL, INCLUDING REVIEW AND INTEGRATION OF AUDIOLOGIC FUNCTION TESTS, ASSESSMENT, AND INTERPRETATION OF HEARING NEEDS (EG, SPEECH-IN-NOISE, SUPRATHRESHOLD HEARING MEASURES), DISCUSSION OF CANDIDACY RESULTS, COUNSELING ON TREATMENT OPTIONS WITH REPORT, AND, WHEN PERFORMED, ASSESSMENT OF COGNITIVE AND COMMUNICATION STATUS; FIRST 30 MINUTES
